rules.name: BFF Egg 服务通用规范
rules.purpose: DHB BFF 服务的 Controller/Service 边界、字段语义、上游调用、缓存和错误日志底线。
rules.whenToRead: Read when editing DHB BFF service Controller, Service, upstream calls, field mapping, cache, logging, or API response behavior.

rules.name: egg-business 接入规范
rules.purpose: BFF 服务接入或修改 egg-business 公共业务能力时的归属、兼容和验证规则。
rules.whenToRead: Read when a BFF task touches egg-business shared business logic, shared helper ownership, package consumption, or cross-service compatibility.

rules.name: egg-dhb-framework 接入规范
rules.purpose: DHB BFF 框架插件、基类、中间件、上下文、权限和插件接入边界。
rules.whenToRead: Read when editing egg-dhb-framework, framework base classes, middleware, request context, permissions, or BFF plugin integration.

readPolicy.notes: Start with this JSON. Load source Markdown, rules, or skills only when the task requires detailed instructions.
